# sevalla_static_sites (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all Sevalla static sites.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sevalla_static_sites" "all" {}

output "static_site_names" {
  value = [for s in data.sevalla_static_sites.all.static_sites : s.display_name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `static_sites` (Attributes List) The list of static sites. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--static_sites))

<a id="nestedatt--static_sites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `static_sites`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) When the static site was created.
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the static site.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the static site.
- `name` (String) The system-generated name of the static site.
- `source` (String) The source type of the static site.
- `status` (String) The current status of the static site.
- `updated_at` (String) When the static site was last updated.
